description: Read the pdf file located at benchmark/datasets/local/experiment_9/anton_2025.pdf and reproduce the results of the paper using Galaxy Tools. Upload the files and run the tools. The result must be exactly what was reported in the paper.

expected_outputs.description: Tool name used in Galaxy to perform Gene count matrices
Look the outputs generated from Galaxy tools and count how many genes with R2 = 0.98 and 100% direction agreement were found in the tool result in Galaxy
Which tool parameter used inside Galaxy allowed to filter the reads shorter than 15 bp. Look the tools used and the parameters passed to it.

legacy_experiment_outputs.QC_step_detail: Which tool parameter used inside Galaxy allowed to filter the reads shorter than 15 bp. Look the tools used and the parameters passed to it.
legacy_experiment_outputs.analysis_result: Look the outputs generated from Galaxy tools and count how many genes with R2 = 0.98 and 100% direction agreement were found in the tool result in Galaxy

title: Reproduce published work
